project.title: Bati yon kat navigasyon senp pou espas travay yon kliyan

moving-around-try-it-1.title: Travay tèminal: antre nan yon katab avèk cd
moving-around-try-it-1.prompt: Ou bezwen pou enter the `navigation-practice` katab. Kouri `ls`, then `cd navigation-practice`, then `pwd` pou konfime ou deplased.
moving-around-try-it-1.hint: List first, deplase second, then konfime ou new kote avèk `pwd`.

help.concept: Yon travay Eseye li ou menm pèmèt ou pratike kòmand nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye katab paran yo anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou avèk ls, cat oswa find anvan ou klike sou Tcheke.

moving-around-try-it-1.starterCode: # Sèvi ak tèminal la pou travay Linux sa a.

0.message: Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

moving-around-try-it-2.title: Travay tèminal: remonte avèk cd ..
moving-around-try-it-2.prompt: Start inside `navigation-practice/start`, then deplase up one level. Kouri `cd navigation-practice/start`, `pwd`, `cd ..`, ak `pwd` again.
moving-around-try-it-2.hint: After `cd ..`, the second `pwd` should montre the parent katab.

help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou avèk ls, cat oswa find anvan ou klike sou Tcheke.

1.message: Kouri `cd ..` pou deplase up one katab.

2.message: Kouri `pwd` pou konfime where ou are.

0.message: Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

moving-around-try-it-3.title: Travay tèminal: retounen lakay avèk cd ~
moving-around-try-it-3.prompt: Jump depi a nested katab back pou ou home katab. Kouri `cd navigation-practice/reports`, `pwd`, `cd ~`, ak `pwd` again.
moving-around-try-it-3.hint: Sèvi ak `~` as the shortcut back pou ou home katab, then konfime avèk `pwd`.

q1.title: Sa `cd` fè
q1.prompt: Ki kòmand changes ou katab aktyèl la nan the Linux Terminal?
q1.hint: Sèvi ak eksplikasyon leson an ak fason kesyon an ekri pou diminye chwa yo.

help.concept: Tèks èd sa a te korije paske premye vèsyon an te montre repons lan twò dirèkteman.
help.hint_1: Compare the question pou the lesson example ak redeplase details that fè not match the requested concept.
help.hint_2: Sèvi ak wòl oswa prèv ki nan enstriksyon an olye ou konte sèlman sou mo ki nan repons yo.

moving-around-single-choice-2.title: Chwazi pi bon deskripsyon an
moving-around-single-choice-2.prompt: Ki statement best matches Moving Around avèk cd?
moving-around-single-choice-2.hint: Chèche the answer that describes the main concept depi the lesson.

help.concept: This question tchekes the main idea depi Moving Around avèk cd.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak the lesson explanation, then eliminate answers that fè not match it.
help.hint_2: Chwazi answer that matches the course concept, not a random detail.

options.a: It describes the main concept depi the lesson.
options.b: It se unrelated pou the course topic.
options.d: It replaces the concept avèk an unan sekirite shortcut.

moving-around-multi-choice-1.title: Chwazi bon abitid aprantisaj ki an sekirite
moving-around-multi-choice-1.prompt: Ki actions se good abitids while aprantisaj this topic?
moving-around-multi-choice-1.hint: Good abitids keep the learner focused on the lesson objektif ak visible reziltas.

help.concept: This question tchekes the main idea depi Moving Around avèk cd.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak the lesson explanation, then eliminate answers that fè not match it.

options.b: Check ou rezilta apre making a change
options.c: Ignore the exact names nan the task
options.d: Sèvi ak unrelated shortcuts san understanding them

moving-around-drag-reorder-1.title: Mete yon koule pratik ki an sekirite nan lòd
moving-around-drag-reorder-1.prompt: Mete sa yo aprantisaj etaps nan a an sekirite order.
moving-around-drag-reorder-1.hint: Li chak moso epi mete yo nan lòd pou deklarasyon an ka byen konprann.

help.concept: Moso yo dwe fòme yon deklarasyon ki valab nan yon lòd ki lojik.
help.hint_1: Kòmanse ak moso ki prezante lide a oswa aksyon an.
help.hint_2: Mete moso ki depann yo apre pati yo dekri oswa konplete a.

q2.title: Monte yon nivo
q2.prompt: Complete the kòmand that deplases depi the katab aktyèl la pou its parent katab.
q2.hint: Sèvi ak the special path that means 'parent katab.'

help.concept: In Linux paths, `..` refers pou the directory one level above ou current kote.
help.hint_1: This se not a kòmand by itself here; li se the target used apre `cd`.
help.hint_2: The parent-katab shortcut uses two dots.

q3.title: Navige antre nan yon katab pwojè
q3.prompt: A script changes katabs anvan doing other work. Ki should li also fè so ou can konfime li ended up nan the right place?
q3.hint: Chèche the option that makes the katab change visible nan the rezilta.

help.concept: A common navigation workflow se kreye a katab avèk `mkdir`, enter li avèk `cd`, ak verify the new repètwa travay la avèk `pwd`.
help.hint_1: Ou bezwen one kòmand pou kreye the katab ak another pou deplase into it.
help.hint_2: After entering `client-site`, run the kòmand that enprime the current repètwa travay la so the tèminal rezilta montres the new kote.

q3.template: A script that changes katabs should also ____ so the rezilta se easy pou verify.
choices: enprime yon rezilta ou ka wè

sketch-1.title: Sa `cd` chanje
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
`cd` means **change directory**. A directory se just another word for a katab. When ou run `cd`, ou deplase ou tèminal's current kote pou a different katab.

A good abitid se pou tcheke where ou se anvan ak apre moving:

```bash
pwd
cd projects
pwd
```

Step by etap:

- `pwd` enprime ou katab aktyèl la.
- `cd projects` deplases into the `projects` katab if li exists nan ou current kote.
- The second `pwd` konfimes the new kote.

Example:

```bash
/home/learner
cd projects
/home/learner/projects
```

This matters because many tèminal kòmands act on ou **katab aktyèl la**. If ou se nan the wrong place, `ls`, `touch`, `mkdir`, `cp`, oswa `mv` may affect the wrong fichyes.

sketch-2.title: Sèvi ak `..`, `.` ak `~`
sketch-2.bodyMarkdown:
Some `cd` targets se shortcuts:

- `..` means **the parent katab**
- `.` means **the katab aktyèl la**
- `~` means **your home katab**

Worked example:

```bash
pwd
cd ..
pwd
cd ~
pwd
```

Line by line:

- The first `pwd` montres where ou start.
- `cd ..` deplases up one level.
- The next `pwd` montres the parent katab.
- `cd ~` jumps pou ou home katab depi anywhere.
- The last `pwd` konfimes that jump.

`cd .` usually keeps ou nan the same place. It can still be useful when ou se practicing path ideas ak want pou montre “stay here.”

sketch-3.title: Li chemen yo ak prekosyon anvan ou deplase
sketch-3.bodyMarkdown:
A path tells the tèminal **which katab** ou want. Before using `cd`, li helps pou enspekte the katab aktyèl la avèk `ls`.

Example:

```bash
pwd
ls
cd reports
ls
```

Ki happens:

- `pwd` montres ou starting kote.
- `ls` liss katabs ak fichyes there.
- `cd reports` deplases into the `reports` katab.
- `ls` now montres what se inside `reports`.

If `reports` se not lised anvan ou try `cd reports`, the kòmand will fail because that katab se not nan ou current kote. Checking avèk `ls` first helps ou deplase confidently ak avoid mistakes.
